channel.title: Teenagers on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Teenagers on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Teenage Tweets
item.description: [![twitter_icons_256](http://www.adoptioncurve.net/archives/2009/07/teenage-tweets.php/twitter_icons_256)[[Crossposted from the Headshift blog](http://www.headshift.com/blog/2009/07/teenage-tweets.php)] The news this morning is full of a report from Morgan Stanley on teenage media habits - written by a 15-year-old intern, it dismisses Twitter and describes online advertising as pointless. Morgan Stanley seem to be promoting the report heavily, although I’m not entirely clear whether this is from the viewpoint of it being a lucid piece of analysis or more of “look! a little person!
